title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving between Accounts linked to different Tenants
scenario: Support > App data does not update correctly when switching between accounts linked to different tenants
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Log in with Account A (Tenant A).
4. Verify that the App info displayed corresponds to Tenant A.
6. Log in with Account B (Tenant B).
8. Verify that the App info displayed corresponds to Tenant B.
expected: After switching accounts, the Support > App screen correctly updates to show the tenant-specific information for the currently logged-in account (Tenant A info for Account A, Tenant B info for Account B).
